Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The ElementCountPerPixelFromFormat method returns the number of elements in each image pixel for the specified image format.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: constexpr static size_t ElementCountPerPixelFromFormat(SourceImageFormat imageFormat); constexpr static size_t ElementCountPerPixelFromFormat(ImageFormat imageFormat);

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: The number of scalar elements contained in each pixel or texel entry for the specified image format.
